tierSet.name: Luminous Bloom
tierSet.twoPiece: Shooting Stars deal 50% more damage and generate 3 additional Astral Power outside Eclipse.
tierSet.fourPiece: Starfall and Starsurge damage increased by 5%, and casting them has a 30% chance to strike an affected target with an exploding Shooting Star that deals Astral damage to all nearby enemies.
tierSet.notes: 4pc chance was reduced from 40% to 30% in a tuning pass. Still extremely strong for both ST and AoE. Synergizes with Starweaver (free spenders proc more Shooting Stars) and Hail of Stars.

trinkets.bestCombination: Vaelgor's Final Stare + Gaze of the Alnseer

rankings.name: Vaelgor's Final Stare
rankings.notes: Coordinate with Incarnation/CA + Force of Nature. Your best burst trinket.

rankings.name: Gaze of the Alnseer
rankings.notes: Mastery stat-stick with random Intellect stacks. Consistent value.

rankings.name: Emberwing Feather
rankings.notes: Alternative on-use. Slightly weaker than Vaelgor's.

rankings.name: Locus-Walker's Ribbon
rankings.notes: Good passive alternative. Best overall low-target trinket.

rankings.name: Wraps of Cosmic Madness
rankings.notes: 2s channel weapon. Resets CD if raid member dies. Niche.

weapon.best: Belo'melorn, The Shattered Talon (2H Staff from Belo'ren)
weapon.craftedAlternative: Aln'hara Cane with Darkmoon Sigil: Hunt embellishment
weapon.notes: Craft a weapon FIRST if you don't have a raid weapon. Weapons scale best with ilvl.

first.name: Darkmoon Sigil: Hunt
first.notes: Best first craft. Put on Aln'hara Cane.

second.name: Arcanoweave Lining
second.notes: Craft on Silvermoon Agent's Deflectors (wrist) or Silvermoon Agent's Utility Belt (waist).
